response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and non-financial embedded systems, with no evidence of production-level financial system development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Experience with CI/CD, testing practices, and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial contexts
